Title: ALTER USER SET
Description: Change the default schema or other properties of a database user account
See also: ALTER USER SET PASSWORD , ALTER USER RENAME , GRANT PRIVILEGES .
Examples:
ALTER USER
user_login_name
[ WITH [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD
pass_phrase
]
    [ SET SCHEMA
schema_name
]
    [ SCHEMA PATH
schema_names_list_as_string
]
    [ DEFAULT ROLE
role_name
]
    [ MAX_MEMORY
num_bytes
| NO MAX_MEMORY ]
    [ MAX_WORKERS
count
| NO MAX_WORKERS ]
